title: Qwen2.5-Omni Technical Report
core_contribution: 首个开源的 omni-modal 端到端模型 (text+image+audio+video → text+speech)。Thinker-Talker 架构: Thinker (dense 7B-class, 28L × 3584, GQA 28/4, FFN 18944) 处理理解, Talker (dense 24L × 896, dual-track AR, vocab 8448) 直接消费 Thinker hidden + token embed 驱动 codec; TM-RoPE (M-RoPE [16,24,24] + 40ms 绝对时间) 对齐音视频; Flow-Matching DiT (22L × 1024, sliding 4-block) + Modified BigVGAN 实现流式波形合成 @ 24kHz.
summary: Qwen2.5-Omni 是 Qwen3-Omni 的前代, 全 dense + 单 codebook + DiT vocoder。Thinker (init Qwen2.5): 28L × 3584, GQA 28/4 head_dim=128, FFN 18944, vocab 152064, M-RoPE [16, 24, 24], context 32768. Talker (dual-track AR): 24L × 896, GQA 12/4, FFN 18944 (居然和 Thinker 同), 输入 = Thinker layer hidden 3584 + 采样 token embed, 输出单 codec stream vocab 8448. Audio Encoder = Whisper-large-v3 init: 32L × 1280, 20 heads × 64, GELU FFN 5120, 2-sec block attn, mel 128/25ms/10ms. Vision Encoder = Qwen2.5-VL ViT: 32L × 1280, 16 heads × 80, patch 14, fullatt @ [7,15,23,31], spatial_merge=2. Speech chain: qwen-tts-tokenizer (单 codebook 8448) → Flow-Matching DiT (22L × 1024, sliding-window 4 blocks: 2 lookback + current + 1 lookahead) → Modified BigVGAN (upsample [5,3,2,2,2,2]) → PCM 24 kHz. TM-RoPE: M-RoPE 三轴 + 40ms/temporal step + 25 Hz alignment grid + 2-sec chunks (视觉先音频后 interleave). 训练: S1 encoder alignment (LLM frozen, adapter-first then encoder) → S2 joint pretrain (800B image + 300B audio + 100B video-with-audio incremental) → S3 long context 32K. 后训练: ChatML SFT + Talker 4 阶段 (continuation → DPO LDPO with WER+pause → multi-speaker FT → timbre disentangle).
key_findings: Talker dense 0.6B: 24×896, GQA 12/4, head_dim=128, FFN 18944, vocab 8448
Talker 输入: Thinker hidden (3584) + 采样 text token embed (紧耦合, Qwen3-Omni 后来解耦)
Audio = Whisper-large-v3 init: 32×1280, 20 heads × head_dim=64, GELU FFN 5120, 2-sec blocks
Vision = Qwen2.5-VL: 32×1280, 16 heads × head_dim=80, fullatt @ [7,15,23,31], spatial_merge=2
Vocoder: DiT 22L × 1024 + BigVGAN, sliding 4-block window (2 back + current + 1 fwd)
Talker post-train: continuation → LDPO (WER + pause reward) → multi-speaker FT → timbre disent
首包延迟 ~640ms+ (DiT 4-block 等 lookahead, vs Qwen3-Omni 234ms)
limitations: 模型规模仅 7B，相对闭源模型参数量有限
语音生成基于 sliding-window DiT 计算开销仍较大
音视频 interleaved 排列依赖 2 秒 chunk，限制时间分辨率
语音理解语种支持有限

infra_impact.algorithm: Thinker-Talker 双组件训练范式为多模态 text+speech 生成开创新方向
infra_impact.kernel: Sliding-window DiT 和 block-wise attention 需定制 kernel
infra_impact.framework: 需支持流式推理的 serving 框架和 Thinker/Talker 异步 prefill
infra_impact.llm: TMRoPE 为多模态位置编码提供通用方案
infra_impact.agent: 端到端语音对话能力直接支持 voice agent 场景

open_questions: Thinker-Talker 紧耦合实际收益多少？Qwen3-Omni 解耦后性能反而提升
Talker 24L × d=896 + FFN 18944 这个'瘦但 FFN 大'设计的根据？
DPO 中 WER + pause reward 权重比例？
25 Hz token rate 是否过高？为什么不直接降到 12.5？
训练 GPU-hours 和 infra 完全黑盒
